AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    IMPORT [[7082546018834]] [[180922.180921]]
    IMPORT Qt.labs.folderlistmodel [[180923.180930]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[8398044571386570029]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[7712155293725601]][.[[214634455770]]=`toolbarProvider.editingTools`]
        INSERT {
	~&454089850271038938&~ {
    ~&5972374&~: imageStickers
    ~&233745975898428&~: ~&6504254477&~
    ~&6504337259&~: ~&454089850271038938&~.~&6503187275&~.~&14888501028015932088&~

    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"5705194963506952154&~
    ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
    ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&7712989577739634&~
    ~&254542253295368380&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233718999756776&~(imageStickers)
    readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ baseFolder: "file:///home/root/stickers"





    FolderListModel {
        ~&5972374&~: stickerImageModel
        ~&7082663378949&~: imageStickers.baseFolder
	rootFolder: imageStickers.baseFolder
        nameFilters: ["*.jpg","*.jpeg","*.png"]
        showDirs: ~&6504329801&~
	showDirsFirst: ~&6504329801&~
        sortField: FolderListModel.~&6502945418&~
    }


    /* -------------------------*/
    /* Foldout content*/
    /* -------------------------*/
    ~&6144132522167405889&~: ~&8398044571386570029&~ {
        ~&5972374&~: imageGridContent
        ~&214646099849&~: 800 
        ~&7082729686082&~: 600
        ~&233724017721034&~: 4
        ~&8400036622101322246&~: 0
        ~&3009194557570366524&~: 0


~&6502786168&~ {
	~&233748328658231&~: stickerImageModel.~&7082663378949&~ !== ~&5971598&~.resolvedUrl(imageStickers.baseFolder)
	~&214646099849&~: 200
	~&7082729686082&~: 200
	~&254501108490678590&~ {
		~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&6503165774&~ {
			~&233748328658231&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.fileIsDir
			~&6504315758&~: "⬆ "
			~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
			~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 80
		}
                    ~&6503165774&~ {
			~&233748328658231&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.fileIsDir
			~&233721384511543&~.~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
			~&233721384511543&~.~&12826966400293002612&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&12826966400293002612&~
			~&233721384511543&~.~&15692798426932296956&~: 8
			~&214624865996&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&8397943310926068554&~
			~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ - 10
                        ~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
                        ~&6504315758&~: "Parent folder"
                        ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 30
                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~
			~&6503823200&~.~&6503679370&~: ~&6504329801&~
                       }
 	    ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                        stickerImageModel.~&7082663378949&~ = stickerImageModel.parentFolder
                                    }
 

	    }

}
    }
        /* JSON stickers*/
~&7712155293725601&~ {
~&214634455770&~: stickerImageModel

    ~&7712922269353028&~: ~&6502786168&~ {
    	required property ~&197102514&~ ~&254539508423767444&~

        ~&214646099849&~: 200 
        ~&7082729686082&~: 200
        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
        ~&6503165774&~ {
            ~&233748328658231&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.fileIsDir
            ~&6504315758&~: "📁"
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
            ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 80
        }
           ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
            ~&7083116119249&~: 10
            ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
            ~&6503711953&~: ~&6504329801&~
            /* Icon preview*/
            ~&214591687532&~ {
	    	~&5972374&~: imageDisplay
	    	~&233748328658231&~: !~&254539508423767444&~.fileIsDir
		~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&7083172477658&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.fileIsDir ? "" : ~&254539508423767444&~.fileUrl
                ~&7713012679492661&~: ~&214591687532&~.~&13563680926116790904&~
		~&214622092445&~: ~&214625660372&~
            }
                    ~&6503165774&~ {
			~&233748328658231&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.fileIsDir
			~&233721384511543&~.~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
			~&233721384511543&~.~&12826966400293002612&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&12826966400293002612&~
			~&233721384511543&~.~&15692798426932296956&~: 8
			~&214624865996&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&8397943310926068554&~
			~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ - 10
                        ~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
                        ~&6504315758&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.fileName
                        ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 30
                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~
			~&6503823200&~.~&6503679370&~: ~&6504329801&~
                       }
         
            ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~

                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
		    ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.fileIsDir) {
			stickerImageModel.~&7082663378949&~ = ~&254539508423767444&~.fileUrl;
		    } ~&6503784146&~ {
			    ~&6504254477&~.~&233718999756776&~(imageStickers)
			    ~&6504254477&~.~&3352491319205423503&~()
			    ~&214622607920&~ ~&7083019050833&~ = ~&254547437090201330&~.~&502817364213021138&~.~&505871454011417333&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&6504254477&~.~&254525457827593836&~.~&214646099849&~/2,~&6504254477&~.~&254525457827593836&~.~&7082729686082&~/2))
			    ~&214622607920&~ containerRect = ~&254547437090201330&~.~&502817364213021138&~.~&505871454011417333&~(~&254547437090201330&~)
			    ~&214622607920&~ imageScale = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(1, 3200 / imageDisplay.~&8400082987879754261&~.~&214646099849&~ , 3200 / imageDisplay.~&8400082987879754261&~.~&7082729686082&~)
			    ~&214622607920&~ imageHeight = imageScale * imageDisplay.~&8400082987879754261&~.~&7082729686082&~ 
			    ~&214622607920&~ imageWidth = imageScale * imageDisplay.~&8400082987879754261&~.~&214646099849&~ 

			    ~&214622607920&~ ~&214641137009&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(1, containerRect.~&214646099849&~ / imageWidth, containerRect.~&7082729686082&~ / imageHeight)


			    ~&11179472971324505115&~.insertImageFileAsSceneItem(~&254539508423767444&~.fileUrl,~&7083019050833&~)

			    ~&5972376&~(~&214641137009&~ !== 1) {
				    ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&10707225540697219036&~(~&11179472971324505115&~.~&15752433948179392809&~,~&7083019050833&~,~&214641137009&~,~&214641137009&~) 
			    }

		    }

                }
		

            }




        }
    }
   

}

    }
}

}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
REDEFINE [[4367731859579753176]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT { -1 }
END REDEFINE
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
